title: eriophyllum lanatum
intro: Eriophyllum lanatum, also known as Oregon sunshine or woolly sunflower, is a perennial shrubby plant native to the western United States, characterized by its grayish leaves and bright yellow flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eriophyllum lanatum include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Eriophyllum lanatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
